title: Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production
summary: Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production
briefing: Bitdeer shares rallied after the company announced a $36 million Nevada manufacturing facility that will produce its SEALMINER Bitcoin mining machines and expand its hardware business.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: White House says it received no Democratic response related to SEC, CFTC vacancies
summary: White House says it received no Democratic response related to SEC, CFTC vacancies
briefing: Both US financial regulators are understaffed at the leadership level and lacking Democratic commissioners, with no announcement from President Donald Trump on filling the roles.

title: Phantom, Hyperliquid ask CFTC to modernize rules for onchain derivatives
summary: Phantom, Hyperliquid ask CFTC to modernize rules for onchain derivatives
briefing: The companies urged the regulator to exempt blockchain developers and non-custodial wallet providers from rules designed for traditional financial intermediaries.

title: Bitcoin miners’ AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
summary: Bitcoin miners’ AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
briefing: As AI-driven mining stocks retreat, investors are examining executive stock sales, governance and shareholder alignment across leading Bitcoin miners, according to Blocksbridge Consulting.

title: UK politicians mull permanent crypto donation ban in wake of Nigel Farage scandal
summary: UK politicians mull permanent crypto donation ban in wake of Nigel Farage scandal
briefing: Labour lawmakers proposed a full moratorium on crypto donations in March, which some have sought be made permanent after millions of dollars in contributions were linked to Reform leader Nigel Farage.

title: Can Bitcoin hold $62K ahead of Friday’s $1.4 billion options expiry?
summary: Can Bitcoin hold $62K ahead of Friday’s $1.4 billion options expiry?
briefing: US 10-year Treasury yields nears dangerous level while major Deribit Bitcoin options expiry approaches.

title: MARA shares surge after 2 GW Texas infrastructure deal expands AI ambitions
summary: MARA shares surge after 2 GW Texas infrastructure deal expands AI ambitions
briefing: The Bitcoin miner's shares climbed about 15% after announcing it's acquiring a Texas site with up to 2 GW of power capacity to expand its AI and digital infrastructure strategy.

title: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
summary: Perplexity Fine-Tuned a Chinese AI Model to Match Claude Opus 4.8 at One-Third the Cost
briefing: The company's post-trained GLM 5.2 preview pairs a cheaper open-source base with a frontier advisor—and it's already live in production.

title: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
summary: Anthropic AI Oversight Board Adds Ben Bernanke, Who Oversaw 2008 Financial Crisis at Fed
briefing: Former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke will have the power to appoint Anthropic board members as part of company's Long-Term Benefit Trust.

title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
summary: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
briefing: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
summary: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
briefing: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

title: Swift Readies Ledger for 24/7 Token Transfers—Though True Settlement Is Stuck on Old Rails
summary: Swift Readies Ledger for 24/7 Token Transfers—Though True Settlement Is Stuck on Old Rails
briefing: Swift’s pilot allows 17 global banks to transfer tokenized deposits on weekends, but ultimate settlement still relies on legacy systems.

title: MARA Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Agrees to Acquire Massive Powered Texas Land Plot
summary: MARA Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Agrees to Acquire Massive Powered Texas Land Plot
briefing: MARA Holdings has agreed to purchase a sizable plot of land in Texas to power its Bitcoin mining and growing AI compute ambitions.

title: Labour MPs Push to Make UK Crypto Donation Ban Permanent
summary: Labour MPs Push to Make UK Crypto Donation Ban Permanent
briefing: The lawmakers have tabled amendments to make the current moratorium permanent, as the fallout over Reform UK's funding widens.

title: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
summary: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
briefing: MoonAgents lets users analyze markets and prepare crypto transactions through Telegram while keeping keys on their own devices.
